evidence_hint: Two metadata-injection engines with divergent header dialects: TS src/comment.ts:25-28 sentinel `>>> l9:meta >>>`/`<<< l9:meta <<<`; Python tools/consolidation/modes/repo_pack/injector.py:11-19 HTML-comment `<!-- L9_META ... /L9_META -->`. Both classify+hash+inject+dedup the same artifact metadata.
residual_if_not_resolved: Declare one engine authoritative (the shipped TS package) and reduce the other to calling it or explicitly out-of-scope; or define one shared header-dialect contract both read/write/strip.
